name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Here's What Gazelka is Saying
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_gazelka_is_saying&n=1)
---
Peter \-- **We are asking the Senate Republican Majority Leader one simple thing: DO NOT pass a budget for Governor Walz until his Emergency Powers are terminated and the Never Again Bill passes!** Listen, after 409 days of one man unilaterally declaring emergency powers, we've had enough. He's already locked us in our homes, shut down our businesses, and forced youth athletes to wear a mask. Now we've seen from a newly released [MIT study](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7IAMgKgUBpo01oRFKwJxMrwKioNsopSMrPog8fuIPrifzAU2KcH9wnxmpGJlp-y519JZfm3LRh7i8kzoXnzorF0&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_gazelka_is_saying&n=2) that Walz' measures were ignorant of the science! But here's what Senate Majority "Leader" Paul Gazelka is telling you... _I feel obligated to pass a budget by June and I reject those that want to shut down the government or fire every commissioner if we don't get our way. All of these strategies destroy the fabric of good government._ **Has this wimp been living under a log for the last year??? Mr Gazelka, what has destroyed the fabric of good government is Unilateral Emergencies Powers and you have ONE OPTION LEFT to end them: Don't Pass a Budget!** It's clear that Gazelka needs to start feeling the heat. We simply cannot let the Senate Republic Sellout happen! If Gazelka and the rest let us down, we could be facing permanent mask mandates and Vaccine Passports in Minnesota. If we lose now, nothing will stop Walz from issuing more executive orders that attack our freedoms! **Help us get the message out. There are two ways to help, starting with helping to support our paid phone calling campaign and bringing real heat on Gazelka and team.** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?__cf_chl_jschl_tk__=29e16e201633d89c2c22ae6098f36d1911b77f82-1619118465-0-AezIfZraHtieeevCFLvuF5E9lgiyVP1QzT8t83rIVBYsgVU098G3uGsSM7HStiDF1jgk9jxKxJwB0y4KrmVpst9bstA-BorxZlWW8nupG8gsUxfCfLgw5nXnr_mW6Vpd4oqPz-EkosWxqxoKBG198lAPd8J27tBQcdx6xNOiSARIaqSt7CLkS012yfO-x1bD3AizzmUM6GFfQ9emWnP-PrSlBt426d4CdO-1-yxzNifIAvMvdOrm7fNyM-UyOkIgXF6FoJEfSuj-rbXV59__IzhVRfn5MCdGFaIyYomxwvhxjxY3fQ9ZC6nFkgcF4hJdNLkh7qa3KAqPz7_qEviPp6fxYCGB08L37AFUoy6nWBWdMntHUZQkoSUybuX-JrKSyxN9CHp2yyru9ib3KN3Qb9A&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_gazelka_is_saying&n=3 "HELP BRING THE HEAT") [HELP BRING THE HEAT](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?__cf_chl_jschl_tk__=29e16e201633d89c2c22ae6098f36d1911b77f82-1619118465-0-AezIfZraHtieeevCFLvuF5E9lgiyVP1QzT8t83rIVBYsgVU098G3uGsSM7HStiDF1jgk9jxKxJwB0y4KrmVpst9bstA-BorxZlWW8nupG8gsUxfCfLgw5nXnr_mW6Vpd4oqPz-EkosWxqxoKBG198lAPd8J27tBQcdx6xNOiSARIaqSt7CLkS012yfO-x1bD3AizzmUM6GFfQ9emWnP-PrSlBt426d4CdO-1-yxzNifIAvMvdOrm7fNyM-UyOkIgXF6FoJEfSuj-rbXV59__IzhVRfn5MCdGFaIyYomxwvhxjxY3fQ9ZC6nFkgcF4hJdNLkh7qa3KAqPz7_qEviPp6fxYCGB08L37AFUoy6nWBWdMntHUZQkoSUybuX-JrKSyxN9CHp2yyru9ib3KN3Qb9A&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_gazelka_is_saying&n=4)
---
Secondly, remind Gazelka and your Senator who they work for! Contact Gazelka's office and your State Senator. Tell them "No deals with Democrats. Do not pass a budget until Walz' Emergency Powers are terminated and the Never Again Bill is passed".
## **Senator Paul Gazelka**
## **Phone: 651-296-4875**
## **Email:[sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn ](mailto:sen.paul.gazelka@senate.mn%C2%A0)**
## [**FIND YOUR SENATOR**](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=sXXfCgrOgKb9G_MAOfSoe_FkWDxdEPAXYgHTHL0X_6UbzURpL4nya4W_2u82PS17&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_gazelka_is_saying&n=5)
Don't like calling or emailing a politician? I get it, it's not for all of us. You can have a HUGE impact by donating to our massive call campaign. We have six paid phone callers right now contacting voters/constituents in Gazelka and other Senators' districts.
This is a serious issue. We could be facing the reality of Vaccine Passports in Minnesota if we fail!
[**Help us ensure this nightmare DOES NOT become a reality by donating $100 today! If that's too much, $50 or $25 is extremely helpful as well. If the issue of vaccine passports and mask mandates is your TOP PRIORITY to eliminate, please consider a donation of $500!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=here_s_what_gazelka_is_saying&n=6)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113

name: Governor Greg Abbott
subject: I’ve seen the problems firsthand
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
| | Dear Friend,

Today I wanted to reach out to talk to you about the crisis at our southern border.

Unfortunately, thanks to President Joe Biden's open-border policies, the crisis at the southern border in Texas and other states grows WORSE by the day.

Due to President Biden's failed leadership, our country is less safe, less secure, and less protected.

_**And I 've had enough.**_

I STRONGLY disapprove of how President Biden is handling this crisis, **[but I want to know where you stand, Friend.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00195yN8hb3yW3D6EJY-njyontIUZNoWGitC1zDvNeF94rjZxdc3yluqBstt5T2y3t0pWOXa_BFGfZ_oihal0oD6tdxi5pviplpqzmedh7cBg7e5d5N59F_GGPDJUQSwCawZfIzgsvogomhXgGTicT6qaLjgd5pEIucxf0VirU2hzKhKpyqSG-Pw6PpCU4a5BV8e8JZV8clQfjmq_4M-roT6ZoHB2LbhQMlc8ykWcWPr9SkXUWH-O_4qeuRXam-TbH3k6nexUaF-roBG2mSOrd-IvdOytsMi74IQ0DYSTRUDeKBi3-wtVr1aM1I3JDs3_5I9MGHSDO_Yug4up6kA3ap6tVTBs9kgkorlw050e8u8dp8SQ9DQjU9IJ-_BZNhUffOddq_qE_XWZVNLsAXf2Lf7w==&c=WbJwMuNEcWHks5vF_87-MYV2GB7l7pHO6n6WFGjmLxuq3kDlB3aEAQ==&ch=CwbwqtwtuwywIefQlkH8AkbO8AFpXUIwEHKb3lnKWWK2Kl_d9W1HQA== "but I want to know where you stand, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%.")** **[TAKE THE OFFICIAL PRESIDENT BIDEN BORDER CRISIS SURVEY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00195yN8hb3yW3D6EJY-njyontIUZNoWGitC1zDvNeF94rjZxdc3yluqBstt5T2y3t0pWOXa_BFGfZ_oihal0oD6tdxi5pviplpqzmedh7cBg7e5d5N59F_GGPDJUQSwCawZfIzgsvogomhXgGTicT6qaLjgd5pEIucxf0VirU2hzKhKpyqSG-Pw6PpCU4a5BV8e8JZV8clQfjmq_4M-roT6ZoHB2LbhQMlc8ykWcWPr9SkXUWH-O_4qeuRXam-TbH3k6nexUaF-roBG2mSOrd-IvdOytsMi74IQ0DYSTRUDeKBi3-wtVr1aM1I3JDs3_5I9MGHSDO_Yug4up6kA3ap6tVTBs9kgkorlw050e8u8dp8SQ9DQjU9IJ-_BZNhUffOddq_qE_XWZVNLsAXf2Lf7w==&c=WbJwMuNEcWHks5vF_87-MYV2GB7l7pHO6n6WFGjmLxuq3kDlB3aEAQ==&ch=CwbwqtwtuwywIefQlkH8AkbO8AFpXUIwEHKb3lnKWWK2Kl_d9W1HQA== "TAKE THE OFFICIAL PRESIDENT BIDEN BORDER CRISIS SURVEY")** _Let us know if you approve of the way President Biden is handling the crisis at the southern border >>>_

**[YES! name: Marco Rubio
subject: Are we going to be short?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I am looking at our numbers before our End of Month Deadline for April -- the first monthly deadline since President Trump endorsed me
|
---
| | |
Friend,

**I am looking at our numbers before our End of Month Deadline for April -- the first monthly deadline since President Trump endorsed me.** His endorsement gave us a huge boost this month, but it energized the Democrats like you wouldn't believe.

We aren't sure we're going to make our goal, and I'll be honest, I noticed you haven't stepped up to donate towards our End of Month goal.

We are working our absolute hardest to combat the attacks by the radical Left. These attacks have increased since we received President Trump's complete and total endorsement -- new attack ads are being launched every week, targeting me for having his support.

Frankly, I'm proud to have President Trump's support. But it puts a target on my race, and if I don't have the resources to stay in this fight... Well, I hope it won't get to that point with your help, Friend.

We CAN'T let it happen.

If you are going to stand with me and President Trump, can we count on you to chip in now? To ensure your donation has a **MASSIVE** impact on the campaign and show you how critical this goal is, I've unlocked **4x matching!**

**Now is the time to take a stand with me and President Trump, Friend. **
**4X MATCHING: UNLOCKED**

name: MondaireForCongress.com
subject: Census data is in:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Even if Mondaire isn’t redistricted out of his seat, a lot could change.
#

The Census just released its 2020 data and announced that **New York is losing a Congressional seat.**
Here’s what could happen next:
* When our district is redrawn, it may become more Republican — and therefore more competitive.
* Mondaire could be drawn into another district and forced to run in a primary against another sitting member of Congress.
* The size, shape, and lines of our district could change dramatically, meaning Mondaire would have to re-introduce himself to hundreds of thousands of new voters.

**[We’ve set a $15,000 fundraising goal for the end of the month on Friday to help us prepare for any challenge that comes our way. Can you make a donation today to help us beat our goal, prepare for the consequences of redistricting, and send Mondaire back to Congress to fight for working people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28289688/282768766/1974547766?refcode2=ff713da7-75a7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210427-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjcxM2RhNy03NWE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i8RMpo9LRupPeGVV7qx7m6C3sSa0whuJdGgKHf0n40Y=)**
Thank you again for supporting Mondaire! No matter what happens with redistricting, a lot could change this cycle. With your help, this movement will overcome any obstacle and we will create a country where everyone has a fair shot.
\- Team Mondaire

name: Marco Rubio
subject: We are so CLOSE...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
I am looking at our numbers before our End of Month Deadline for April -- the first monthly deadline since President Trump endorsed me
| You are receiving this email because our records indicate you are a supporter of the Republican Party. You can [unsubscribe](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9484208/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk0ODQyMDg%3d&x=6117656a) at any time.

---
| | |
Friend,

**I am looking at our numbers before our End of Month Deadline for April -- the first monthly deadline since President Trump endorsed me.** His endorsement gave us a huge boost this month, but it energized the Democrats like you wouldn't believe.

We aren't sure we're going to make our goal, and I'll be honest, I noticed you haven't stepped up to donate towards our End of Month goal.

We are working our absolute hardest to combat the attacks by the radical Left. These attacks have increased since we received President Trump's complete and total endorsement -- new attack ads are being launched every week, targeting me for having his support.

Frankly, I'm proud to have President Trump's support. But it puts a target on my race, and if I don't have the resources to stay in this fight... Well, I hope it won't get to that point with your help, friend.

We CAN'T let it happen.

If you are going to stand with me and President Trump, can we count on you to chip in now? To ensure your donation has a **MASSIVE** impact on the campaign and show you how critical this goal is, I've unlocked **4x matching!**

**Now is the time to take a stand with me and President Trump, friend. **

name: Team Young
subject: Take a moment to grade Nancy Pelosi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress

Let us know your honest thoughts and how Speaker Pelosi is doing.

She continues to push her Far Left agenda which only benefits those that are closest to her. **Now, she is siding with Governor Newsom even though he has failed California.** Speaker Pelosi would rather keep her friends in high places, rather than doing what's right for America. ➡️ Legislation introduced to pack the Supreme Court

➡️ New taxes that will cripple Americans

➡️ Dangerous plans to implement socialist policies

I could keep going, but you get the idea. The Far Left has been so active lately, I needed to make sure I and my fellow Republicans could count on our grassroots team for support so we can stand up to these radical policies.

I've been fighting to stand up to Pelosi and her allies since the day I was sworn into Congress. **It has been my mission to fight for lower taxes, help small businesses, secure our border, and to get America back on the right track.**

I need to know, though, if these are still things that are important to you. clean_body: It has been my mission to fight for lower taxes, help small businesses, secure our border, and to get America back on the right track. ** . == Friend, Lately, the Democrats have been extremely aggressive with their tactics to cling to power: ➡️ Legislation introduced to pack the Supreme Court ➡️ New taxes that will cripple Americans ➡️ Dangerous plans to implement socialist policies I could keep going, but you get the idea. The Far Left has been so active lately, I needed to make sure I and my fellow Republicans could count on our grassroots team for support so we can stand up to these radical policies. I've been fighting to stand up to Pelosi and her allies since the day I was sworn into Congress. It has been my mission to fight for lower taxes, help small businesses, secure our border, and to get America back on the right track. I need to know, though, if these are still things that are important to you. == | 🔽 SIGN BELOW TO SUPPORT MICHELLE STEEL🔽 DO YOU STAND WITH MICHELLE: == DO YOU STAND WITH MICHELLE: ==** It's true now more than ever that we have to stick together if we have any chance of retiring Nancy Pelosi and getting America on the right path. Having the support of my grassroots team is extremely important to me, so I do hope you will take the time to sign your name, Friend. body:
The Left's extreme climate agenda is a disaster for Americans.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gwoYT2is4nTfb2-UTZpvqQIrwlhjMU2Pz3OkB3h7z3bNWZYUpUK8ZQ9gGvIXcbn_OdQCTYmWy3quW4CxHpTQUX-0G3OJ_n_LHgW6xzSMnGPMnKGMRwwWmEmNK0C42ZB_1Zmt_lswdsVwHKuJeb5URbDWZOHqUKpKb63JoO2CPKdiQc0-3LvUVmKPZ2b_x2hm2c7ufDmrZN-3Ug3lS4SD44P3lDjBkN7x8CRTe3488qjkpPyLGZSEOToHPs_9-g5vjQi1h3ESYrrJEdhjw7JRPCRap1xbPk_6aaTD7x4T5QyH8IVJQn-2hz4Y65a95ei-tRZtAuihNM-yMBQ_3L8TLL4EY9udejiC_EmpfeYCjtb3dfmS5LTBwYt7fRqJ18jug1IC8AZ6A_6d9sbMiuO8WKaZoiUK1CN63fFN4iMa-m6KyeuP9b6jofwxYojeCdg_&c=ED48IUXn7CaPig_O93cylGaSZiihNUlh4vFScBseudFC27KiMeEO9w==&ch=7yeDbSpd3egrPD-UKrd6FpjQeSi8VOt1u1-pRmQv_wZjmYZig-vwBw==)
**FIRST:** Joe Biden SHUT DOWN the Keystone XL Pipeline on his FIRST day as president.

**THEN:** THOUSANDS of American energy workers were out of a job, threatening the livelihoods of their families as well as American energy independence.

**NOW:** Liberal climate activists have sold Biden on their Green New Deal, which would END the American energy industry as we know it.

Friend -- The Left's EXTREME climate agenda will crush American jobs and send them overseas. [**It 's up to us to stand up TODAY, and say 'NO' to this reckless idea.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gwoYT2is4nTfb2-UTZpvqQIrwlhjMU2Pz3OkB3h7z3bNWZYUpUK8ZQ9gGvIXcbn_OdQCTYmWy3quW4CxHpTQUX-0G3OJ_n_LHgW6xzSMnGPMnKGMRwwWmEmNK0C42ZB_1Zmt_lswdsVwHKuJeb5URbDWZOHqUKpKb63JoO2CPKdiQc0-3LvUVmKPZ2b_x2hm2c7ufDmrZN-3Ug3lS4SD44P3lDjBkN7x8CRTe3488qjkpPyLGZSEOToHPs_9-g5vjQi1h3ESYrrJEdhjw7JRPCRap1xbPk_6aaTD7x4T5QyH8IVJQn-2hz4Y65a95ei-tRZtAuihNM-yMBQ_3L8TLL4EY9udejiC_EmpfeYCjtb3dfmS5LTBwYt7fRqJ18jug1IC8AZ6A_6d9sbMiuO8WKaZoiUK1CN63fFN4iMa-m6KyeuP9b6jofwxYojeCdg_&c=ED48IUXn7CaPig_O93cylGaSZiihNUlh4vFScBseudFC27KiMeEO9w==&ch=7yeDbSpd3egrPD-UKrd6FpjQeSi8VOt1u1-pRmQv_wZjmYZig-vwBw==)

**[**PROTECT OUR JOBS**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gwoYT2is4nTfb2-UTZpvqQIrwlhjMU2Pz3OkB3h7z3bNWZYUpUK8ZQ9gGvIXcbn_OdQCTYmWy3quW4CxHpTQUX-0G3OJ_n_LHgW6xzSMnGPMnKGMRwwWmEmNK0C42ZB_1Zmt_lswdsVwHKuJeb5URbDWZOHqUKpKb63JoO2CPKdiQc0-3LvUVmKPZ2b_x2hm2c7ufDmrZN-3Ug3lS4SD44P3lDjBkN7x8CRTe3488qjkpPyLGZSEOToHPs_9-g5vjQi1h3ESYrrJEdhjw7JRPCRap1xbPk_6aaTD7x4T5QyH8IVJQn-2hz4Y65a95ei-tRZtAuihNM-yMBQ_3L8TLL4EY9udejiC_EmpfeYCjtb3dfmS5LTBwYt7fRqJ18jug1IC8AZ6A_6d9sbMiuO8WKaZoiUK1CN63fFN4iMa-m6KyeuP9b6jofwxYojeCdg_&c=ED48IUXn7CaPig_O93cylGaSZiihNUlh4vFScBseudFC27KiMeEO9w==&ch=7yeDbSpd3egrPD-UKrd6FpjQeSi8VOt1u1-pRmQv_wZjmYZig-vwBw==)**

name: Team NHGOP
subject: What we've been up to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
We're working hard to hold the Democrats Accountable

**_In case you missed it - April Update_**
---

The New Hampshire GOP has been extremely busy throughout April. In case you missed them, here are a few of our activities and accomplishments over the course of the past month.

**Kamala at the Wrong Border**

This past week, Vice President Kamala Harris came to town. Though her intent was to come here to promote yet another round of massive spending, this time under the guise of an “infrastructure” bill, by the time she left, the story read differently than she had hoped.
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fwrong-border-kamala/1/01000179135ab4ea-1b193ba7-489e-4b75-a44d-2d914eb997e8-000000/R9TLbN582tLmyK8AKUoXADdhIfU=211)
It has now been over a month since Kamala Harris was put in charge of managing the ever-worsening border crisis. When she made her way up to New Hampshire last week, a mere 2,000 miles from the crisis she is responsible for, we were sure to meet her, reminding her that she had come to the wrong border. While the situation at our southern border continues to spiral out of control, Kamala Harris is avoiding her responsibilities at all costs, preferring photo-ops to effective leadership. When she left New Hampshire, the headlines asked the obvious question: [Why had she even come here in the first place?](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fwrong-border-kamala/2/01000179135ab4ea-1b193ba7-489e-4b75-a44d-2d914eb997e8-000000/y2kf5jfJ0A8FZSy02arsfr0QGvU=211)

**Bill Boyd Defeats Big Spending Democrats**

April 13th was a big day for the town of Merrimack and all of New Hampshire, as the seat formerly held by the late Republican Speaker of the House, Dick Hinch, was up for grabs. By the end of the night Boyd had claimed a solid victory, and Republicans across the country were taking notice.

[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdonate/1/01000179135ab4ea-1b193ba7-489e-4b75-a44d-2d914eb997e8-000000/Pn3e-Ws6P3QAam60pDRo-Z6UUt4=211)

After losing their majorities in the New Hampshire House of Representatives, Senate, and Executive Council in 2020, Democrats came into the Merrimack special election determined to turn the tide, and willing to spend whatever it took to claim victory. But the big-spending Democrats could not buy the victory they so desperately craved, despite out-spending Republicans by a 2 to 1 margin. When all votes were tallied, Republican Bill Boyd had defeated his radical opponent Wendy Thomas by a solid 8 points.

**Holding Hassan Accountable - Defending the FITN Primary**

Maggie Hassan has made a bad habit of putting Washington DC before her constituents here in New Hampshire. This past month she has supported legislation that could lead to the end of one of our most cherished traditions, the First in the Nation Presidential Primary.
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefend-fitn%2F/1/01000179135ab4ea-1b193ba7-489e-4b75-a44d-2d914eb997e8-000000/JTSmJjrkWV0eqK7nWHQwc_W141E=211)
Earlier this month, Maggie Hassan signaled her support for HR1, a bill which would effectively federalize elections, and eliminate state oversight. Even our Democrat Secretary of State Bill Gardner, one of our primary’s fiercest defenders, testified to the United States Senate that HR1/S1 could have disastrous consequences for our state's election laws and our presidential primary. We were quick to hold Maggie Hassan accountable, collecting thousands of signatures asking her to REJECT HR1, stop the federalization of our elections, [and DEFEND our First-in-the-Nation Primary.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefend-fitn%2F/2/01000179135ab4ea-1b193ba7-489e-4b75-a44d-2d914eb997e8-000000/1yQQwNy0gGhIefm8D-uAVceaZZk=211)

The New Hampshire Republican Party is working everyday to advance Republican principles, hold state and national Democrats accountable, and elect more Republicans than ever before in 2022. We can only do this with your support - [please consider donating to our efforts today.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdonate/2/01000179135ab4ea-1b193ba7-489e-4b75-a44d-2d914eb997e8-000000/HIXqahHBBFko-QHozCXWB6ZSI3E=211)

Your donation will mean so much to empower Republicans in New Hampshire to help take back the United States House and Senate from Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer in 2022. Please consider donating securely through WinRed here: [https://secure.winred.com/new-hampshire-gop/donate](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdonate/3/01000179135ab4ea-1b193ba7-489e-4b75-a44d-2d914eb997e8-000000/ZpHZdKyukCWiH6JSDltO2xyXl5A=211)

[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdonate/4/01000179135ab4ea-1b193ba7-489e-4b75-a44d-2d914eb997e8-000000/YaOjh7KDQgslvTfs0lt2yN0mi70=211)

Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate's Committee

| | Peter, Rather than debating the minimum wage, gun safety, DC residents' need for equal representations, voting rights, health care reform or infrastructure, the Senate is spending time on _the filibuster_. Not substantive policy debates where we can work out our differences and actually solve problems — that would be asking to much; for government to actually work for us. Instead, they are busy talking about _the filibuster_? It is an arcane procedure, unique in the whole world, to our Senate. A procedure used to protect Jim Crow laws and segregation, never something intended by our founders as part of our government. Now, some people are calling it sacred? No way! **I'm running for the U.S. Senate because it's time for them to get back to work, and I think an outside perspective is _exactly_ what we need right now. [So please chip in $8 today and let's build this movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28292912/282780627/-34735242?refcode=2021-04-27-filibuster&recurring=0&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0c10cec9-7ea7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzEwY2VjOS03ZWE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WmH2M6RZCQUZWr2WPdpMZSwxW6IuKeVSokENWJjEtmI=)** I support **eliminating the filibuster** because of what it has become in the U.S. Senate – a method to slow things down and stop reasonable discussion. clean_body: | | | Peter, Rather than debating the minimum wage, gun safety, DC residents' need for equal representations, voting rights, health care reform or infrastructure, the Senate is spending time on the filibuster. Not substantive policy debates where we can work out our differences and actually solve problems — that would be asking to much; for government to actually work for us. Instead, they are busy talking about the filibuster? It is an arcane procedure, unique in the whole world, to our Senate. A procedure used to protect Jim Crow laws and segregation, never something intended by our founders as part of our government. Now, some people are calling it sacred? No way! I'm running for the U.S. Senate because it's time for them to get back to work, and I think an outside perspective is exactly what we need right now. = I support eliminating the filibuster because of what it has become in the U.S. Senate – a method to slow things down and stop reasonable discussion. Most Americans don't understand the filibuster and even fewer can explain it. Our government should not be that complex. I know people want reasonable debates over climate change, creating jobs, preventing gun violence and health care. But arguing to save the filibuster? Not a chance. = because it's time for a real debate about things that actually matter. name: Senator Tim Scott
subject: My message for the American people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
You'll hear me address this and much more Wednesday night, but the radical Left is already attacking me and trying to CANCEL my speech.

Friend,

I am honored to be giving the Republican Address to the Nation following President Joe Biden's first speech to Congress on Wednesday night.

America has reached a critical inflection point. Now 100 days into the Biden administration, the consequences of Democrats' failed leadership are becoming clear.

You'll hear me address this and much more Wednesday night, but the radical Left is already attacking me and trying to CANCEL my speech. [**Will you help me stand up to the radical Left and fight off their attacks?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210427_TY-2.101720_senator-tim-scott_t1059969-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210427_my-message-for-the-american-people/)
[Stand With Me >>> Donate Now](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210427_TY-2.101720_senator-tim-scott_t1059969-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210427_my-message-for-the-american-people/)
---

**Democrats and the liberal media are desperate to stop me** from speaking directly to the American people about how they are being failed by their liberal leaders who are taxing and transforming us into a socialist country.

**They do _NOT_ want the American people to hear my story** of living the American Dream, and hear about how Republicans have a plan to create a country that is more prosperous and more free for everyone.
**
[Can you support me by pitching in a donation of $100, $25, or any amount?](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210427_TY-2.101720_senator-tim-scott_t1059969-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210427_my-message-for-the-american-people/)** I need your support to make sure the Left cannot silence me.

Democrats are trying to divide Americans along racial and class lines. Having a black conservative like me on national television is going to _destroy_ their narrative.

I've got a positive, authentic message to share with the American people about how the Republican Party can do a much better job than Joe Biden's Democrats. _But I need your help to get my message out, Friend._

[**Please pitch in a donation of any amount to stand with me ahead of my Republican Address to the Nation.**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210427_TY-2.101720_senator-tim-scott_t1059969-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210427_my-message-for-the-american-people/)

Thank you,

Senator Tim Scott
[Stand With Me >>> Donate Now](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/big-news-speech/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210427_TY-2.101720_senator-tim-scott_t1059969-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210427_my-message-for-the-american-people/)

I need your support to make sure the Left cannot silence me. Democrats are trying to divide Americans along racial and class lines. Having a black conservative like me on national television is going to destroy their narrative. I've got a positive, authentic message to share with the American people about how the Republican Party can do a much better job than Joe Biden's Democrats. But I need your help to get my message out, Friend. name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: A reflection and some news
body:
Peter,

I’ve been spending the last week reflecting on the conviction of former Minneapolis police officer Derek Chauvin. I must admit: I have conflicted feelings. While one can take solace at the measure of accountability, there is also a saddening realization that it is not going to bring back George Floyd to his family. Real justice looks like George Floyd and the countless others who have been victims of police brutality in our country still being with us and their families today.

The verdict is a sobering reminder that there is much work to be done in America. We have to systematically rethink policing, and to be honest, that will not be easy. Our current and future generations are counting on us to renew our faith and commitment to this work, so that we may build the kind of just society we all seek to live in.

I also wanted to share a bit of news, I’ve been appointed the Executive Director of CORO New York. CORO has been cultivating young leaders who not only seek to make a difference in our city and state, but tackle the most complex and relevant issues affecting all New Yorkers. As New York works to recover from COVID-19 and address racial injustice, CORO’s mission is more relevant than ever. I couldn’t be more hopeful to lead CORO at this moment. In the days, weeks, and months ahead, I’ll be filling you in on the work I’ll be doing to continue to support our community and beyond.

With gratitude,
Adem

body:

**" You're going to see A LOT of GREAT things for the Republican Party!" -Donald J. Trump**

Do you agree with President Trump's statement?
| [**YES**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/stand-with-trump/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210427_TY-2.101720_mike_t1059975-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210427_do-you-agree-with-president-trump) | **[**NO**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/stand-with-trump/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210427_TY-2.101720_mike_t1059975-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210427_do-you-agree-with-president-trump)**
---

If you answered yes to that question, then you know we have A LOT of work to do before we're able to make that statement come true & it all begins with YOU. [**Our grassroots supporters are the ones that are going to make taking back the Senate in 2022 possible.**](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/stand-with-trump/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210427_TY-2.101720_mike_t1059975-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210427_do-you-agree-with-president-trump)

The good news is, we just need ONE SEAT. One seat to prove President Trump right! If every Trump supporter on this list steps up, we'll see not only GREAT things but PHENOMENAL things for the Republican party. Will you stand with Trump and his Senate allies?
****[MAKE THE REPUBLICAN PARTY GREAT AGAIN](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/stand-with-trump/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210427_TY-2.101720_mike_t1059975-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210427_do-you-agree-with-president-trump)****
---

Thank you for everything,

Mike

****

Hey there, did you see this?
Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the Senate. **CNN just ranked New Hampshire as a top battleground state, and they 're reporting that this race is going to get "much more competitive."**
This race was already getting more and more competitive by the day. Back to back polls show Maggie Hassan down by single digits, outside groups are spending big on attack ads, and our fundraising numbers have taken a real nosedive.
If we miss our April fundraising goal, Republicans will get one step closer to taking back the Senate. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: What I said on MSNBC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
This election is on a knife’s edge.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28298869/282800890/-2023814932?refcode=20210427_TM_4AZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTE5NWJjZS05MGE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzeC1pVhphlPpZY6mtVhWdNCvt0kDGpRP1dHE8ulov4=)

| | In a moment, I’m going to tell you what I said on MSNBC, but before I do, I wanted to ask you directly for a contribution to my 2021 Governor’s campaign.

**[Can you contribute $17 or more to my campaign right now? Nate Silver's 538 says Virginia is 2021's most competitive state and we need your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28298870/282800891/-2023814932?refcode=20210427_TM_4AZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTE5NWJjZS05MGE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AzeC1pVhphlPpZY6mtVhWdNCvt0kDGpRP1dHE8ulov4=)**

I said it on MSNBC and I’ll tell anyone who wants to listen:

Virginia is _not_ a blue state, and we should be worried about Republicans winning this November.

That’s not just me saying it -- that’s coming from everyone from legendary Virginia expert Larry Sabato to political analysts at Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight.

History says Republicans are favored to win. If we sit back, self-proclaimed “Trump in heels” Amanda Chase will be the next Governor of Virginia.

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: We have to stop this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K91RFqwLh4-QcnOovmNmU3y0cs9eea7cTr_yle7iViNnrOOYLHiHec88iTG2eWyJyzY6xwG2RuzY9PT5D1Ygbr937MteZvMBUESktBIrjVa4yAi69K4svTNIiarOrHiqWFNrENocE_hFuLSRXsFk9MVys7KXgMTMY8bHsOtV1SZj-41ICKhLDq5yPKhB9jf6J4WO8q0gslo=&c=8KUWA1SGSFmywp-287Ja8JAEh3X9borTcQsSE9uEP-AUTfioXkxGgg==&ch=QXMXvYP-5_CzHCRWGBOMxBK3hyBoyWbvoM8IejHtye-jMyysqeZzZA==&jrc=1)

| Peter,
There's a push in Congress to give the Swamp even more power by granting D.C. statehood, and we HAVE to fight it at all costs.
What bureaucrats and career politicians have ALREADY done to our nation's capital is sickening: using National Guard troops there for political theater, allowing crime to skyrocket, letting the Deep State run amok.
But it will all be made even worse if Democrats get their way this week, and shamelessly use Washington, D.C. as a means of getting two new far-left Senators. [We have to stop it!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K91RFqwLh4-QcnOovmNmU3y0cs9eea7cTr_yle7iViNnrOOYLHiHec88iTG2eWyJyzY6xwG2RuzY9PT5D1Ygbr937MteZvMBUESktBIrjVa4yAi69K4svTNIiarOrHiqWFNrENocE_hFuLSRXsFk9MVys7KXgMTMY8bHsOtV1SZj-41ICKhLDq5yPKhB9jf6J4WO8q0gslo=&c=8KUWA1SGSFmywp-287Ja8JAEh3X9borTcQsSE9uEP-AUTfioXkxGgg==&ch=QXMXvYP-5_CzHCRWGBOMxBK3hyBoyWbvoM8IejHtye-jMyysqeZzZA==&jrc=1)

| | | [JOIN THE FIGHT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K91RFqwLh4-QcnOovmNmU3y0cs9eea7cTr_yle7iViNnrOOYLHiHec88iTG2eWyJyzY6xwG2RuzY9PT5D1Ygbr937MteZvMBUESktBIrjVa4yAi69K4svTNIiarOrHiqWFNrENocE_hFuLSRXsFk9MVys7KXgMTMY8bHsOtV1SZj-41ICKhLDq5yPKhB9jf6J4WO8q0gslo=&c=8KUWA1SGSFmywp-287Ja8JAEh3X9borTcQsSE9uEP-AUTfioXkxGgg==&ch=QXMXvYP-5_CzHCRWGBOMxBK3hyBoyWbvoM8IejHtye-jMyysqeZzZA==&jrc=1)
---
| For those keeping score at home, Democrats have floated expanding the Supreme Court, abolishing the filibuster, and now granting D.C. Statehood all as means of keeping perpetual control over our government, and over you and your family.
Blatant power-grabs are behind just about every move they make, and even the ones they don't - the inaction we're seeing towards the Biden Border Crisis is their own sick way of getting a new wave of Blue voters.
---
| | | [STOP THE LEFT'S POWER GRABS!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K91RFqwLh4-QcnOovmNmU3y0cs9eea7cTr_yle7iViNnrOOYLHiHec88iTG2eWyJyzY6xwG2RuzY9PT5D1Ygbr937MteZvMBUESktBIrjVa4yAi69K4svTNIiarOrHiqWFNrENocE_hFuLSRXsFk9MVys7KXgMTMY8bHsOtV1SZj-41ICKhLDq5yPKhB9jf6J4WO8q0gslo=&c=8KUWA1SGSFmywp-287Ja8JAEh3X9borTcQsSE9uEP-AUTfioXkxGgg==&ch=QXMXvYP-5_CzHCRWGBOMxBK3hyBoyWbvoM8IejHtye-jMyysqeZzZA==&jrc=1)

name: Christy Smith
subject: I say “thank you” a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
All this support is amazing to see
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28300470/282809335/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjgxMzJlMy05NGE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=giYfjLAN2KxMgHKp9HVZEdtqxxPSm-Wp91NiVEz2mPY=&emci=f5d8dadc-94a7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=b28132e3-94a7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

It hasn’t even been a month since our campaign to take back CA-25 (re-)launched, and we’ve already seen _amazing_ support from our friends and neighbors here in California and across the country.

**_752 people have pitched in to our campaign since March 31st._**

Now, donating isn’t the only way to power our team -- but it definitely helps.

That’s why I want to show you this map, which I absolutely love:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28300471/282809336/-1960682280?refcode=em21_210427_eom2-s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjgxMzJlMy05NGE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=giYfjLAN2KxMgHKp9HVZEdtqxxPSm-Wp91NiVEz2mPY=)
Each of those dots represents one donation to our campaign.

I can’t say thank you to each of our donors personally, so I try to say it as often as possible in these emails. We _truly_ appreciate your support.

**[Peter, right now, our first end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up. That’s why I have to ask if you could add a dot to our map and make a donation of any size before midnight on the 30th.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28300472/282809337/-1960682280?refcode=em21_210427_eom2-s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjgxMzJlMy05NGE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=giYfjLAN2KxMgHKp9HVZEdtqxxPSm-Wp91NiVEz2mPY=)**

We’re proud to be a grassroots campaign, one by and for people like you. That’s why I’ll _never_ take corporate PAC money: **I want you to know that when I’m elected, I’ll be loyal to you --_not_ special interests.**

But it also makes it a bit harder for us to compete with Mike Garcia’s fundraising numbers. We recently saw his first-quarter fundraising record, and the truth is, **he outraised us.** But he also received _over $18,000_ from political committees like PACs.

**[If we’re going to keep up with Mike in the second quarter and beyond, we need to step up our game. Please, chip in whatever you can to help Team Christy meet our April goal so we can start this quarter strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28300473/282809338/-1960682280?refcode=em21_210427_eom2-s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjgxMzJlMy05NGE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=giYfjLAN2KxMgHKp9HVZEdtqxxPSm-Wp91NiVEz2mPY=)**

Thanks so much,

Christy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28300474/282809339/-1960682280?refcode=em21_210427_eom2-s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjgxMzJlMy05NGE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=giYfjLAN2KxMgHKp9HVZEdtqxxPSm-Wp91NiVEz2mPY=)

| Christy Smith is only soliciting funds that comply with federal campaign finance laws.

name: Team Faulconer
subject: 🚨 IT’S OFFICIAL 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Signature verification UPDATE. Read more >>
**BREAKING: IT’S OFFICIAL**
The Secretary of State has verified over 1.5 million signatures.
_**We’re headed to a RECALL election!**_ [**Rush a RECALL Contribution >**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d3d068d644e5ce4b/e9ab8148f3cb9083c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Peter, The California Secretary of State has officially verified over 1.5 million petition signatures, passing the threshold needed to qualify for a recall election. While we won’t know the exact election date for some time, we know it’ll be held in November or December of this year. Almost two million voters took a stand for their communities and families by signing the recall petition. Now, we are one step closer to ending Newsom’s one-party iron grip on the state. **Gavin Newsom failures have become OUR problems. But enough is enough!** _ENOUGH of children struggling while administrators refuse to reopen schools._ _ENOUGH of businesses shuttering for good at record rates._ _ENOUGH of a broken unemployment system that has failed those who need it most._ _ENOUGH of the hypocrisy._ _ENOUGH of the hollow promises & political talking points._ **_ENOUGH OF NEWSOM!_** Our grassroots supporters are more important than ever as we gear up for this fight. We have a critical deadline looming at MIDNIGHT on April 30th, and we need every supporter to pitch in for our efforts! [**Rush a RECALL Contribution NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d3d068d644e5ce4b/8e2fdd5151bbd968c3d6b838967d376c/34943) Gavin Newsom has made an absolute mess of things here in California, and it’s time to put someone in charge with proven leadership ability. Kevin has the experience needed to jump in on day one and turn the ship around. He did it in San Diego, and he can do it again for the entire state. It’ll be a fight to the finish, Peter. But Kevin can do it with your help!

-Team Faulconer [**Rush a RECALL Contribution NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d3d068d644e5ce4b/772730aca18e359bc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d3d068d644e5ce4b/8921d76d68acfdf9c3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d3d068d644e5ce4b/4f883eb19108acbcc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d3d068d644e5ce4b/3e1a0a8aae5c6f8bc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/d3d068d644e5ce4b/3df8697303763ddec3d6b838967d376c/34943)

Kevin has the experience needed to jump in on day one and turn the ship around. He did it in San Diego, and he can do it again for the entire state. It’ll be a fight to the finish, Peter. But Kevin can do it with your help! -Team Faulconer | | | | | ---|---|---|--- id:2021-04-19-13:57:57:791t Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022

subject: Did you see this disgusting attack on Tim Scott, Friend?

body:

body:
Maxine Waters should face consequences
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z2bNAADis2Rq8Eo6rG231VjNILB_wDDzwFsbdZ3Y7jhyky-aYtJ4DKep5-kqUDxuhZI-C7tLaj8dOL9Zg3BoVuzvrcjnQKMXYTeKwYS15LdJmRjBpjdypKXnY8M7HPs07InJu8_RS1GjC1OmEeiAaAxUQME79jl-_wOxJS2cO20=&c=Ox_txyHerijNgyFPwciJUVy28SvAUmB6RiCCailLMFTZI-i83_eZvA==&ch=982geQofuXJexSTJOY3gqi81ssAkrf37n6lZ7ZLaayO7prxTIakoPg==&jrc=1)
---
| Patriot,
As emotions ran high and tensions were tight, Maxine Waters agitated protestors and made calls for "confrontation" in Minneapolis against the police and National Guard that were called to serve their communities.
We need to support our law enforcement officers and stop this harmful rhetoric. Now is the time when we need to stand up against the radical left and stop this dangerous path forward.

name: Team Malcolm
subject: re: we made a difficult decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Still a huge hole in our budget
#

Hey, it’s Vanessa again.
So far, over 150 donors have stepped up to fill the gap in our budget created by expanding our digital outreach — which will help us build a giant coalition of working families to send a working-class champion to the U.S. Senate.
But we haven’t quite raised enough money to make up the difference, and I’m worried that we’ll end the month with a huge hole in our budget.
**I’m hoping we can turn things around today, though. If 150 more people give by midnight tonight, we’ll be in the clear.**
[So I’m asking you to dig deep, folks. Will you chip in $3 to fill this gap and send Malcolm Kenyatta to the U.S. Senate to fight for working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28305387/282824846/-347207331?refcode2=371c9884-a4a7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210427-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzFjOTg4NC1hNGE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cc6BQZ1G34Cloju-hQqggyz1QS-GK0DvOxpq7z6xU3k=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28305388/282824847/-347207331?refcode2=371c9884-a4a7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210427-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzFjOTg4NC1hNGE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cc6BQZ1G34Cloju-hQqggyz1QS-GK0DvOxpq7z6xU3k=)**
I’ll be upfront with you. We don’t have much wiggle room in our budget — _none_ , really.
**Our opponents outraised us by a lot quarter, and that means we have to make our money stretch three times as far.**
We do that by making strategic, timely moves (like this one) that will help us quickly build a huge coalition of folks to power our movement for working people.
But for that to pay off, we have to make sure the rest of our budget stays in place.
[Will you help us do that by coming through with a donation to Malcolm’s campaign today? I hope you’ll be one of the 150 people we need to give before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28305389/282824848/-347207331?refcode2=371c9884-a4a7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210427-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzFjOTg4NC1hNGE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cc6BQZ1G34Cloju-hQqggyz1QS-GK0DvOxpq7z6xU3k=)
Thanks in advance for reading and chipping in what you can.
In solidarity,
Vanessa Clifford
Campaign Manager
Malcolm Kenyatta for U.S. Senate
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28305390/282824849/-347207331?refcode2=371c9884-a4a7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&refcode=em210427-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzFjOTg4NC1hNGE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cc6BQZ1G34Cloju-hQqggyz1QS-GK0DvOxpq7z6xU3k=)**

P.S. Do you like podcasts? Malcolm is a featured guest on this week’s episode of You and Me Both with Hillary Clinton, and his episode is live now! Listen [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28305391/282824850/415695360?refcode=em210427-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzFjOTg4NC1hNGE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cc6BQZ1G34Cloju-hQqggyz1QS-GK0DvOxpq7z6xU3k=&emci=351c9884-a4a7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=371c9884-a4a7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=18034979) or wherever you get your podcasts.

name: Serve America
subject: Support Medicare expansion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28306651/282828532/-333616605?refcode=email_20210427_SA_Letter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTYwM2I0Mi1hOWE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJoL63LdJSlWItXxb1NJWdMdvqbAB7dPeF68ANhYseY=) Friend, Ahead of President Biden’s expected release of the American Families Plan, three Serve America-endorsed Members of Congress are leading an effort to expand Medicare benefits. Reps. Jared Golden, Joe Neguse, and Conor Lamb are requesting that President Biden:
* Reduce the Medicare eligibility age
* Expand Medicare benefits to include hearing, dental and vision care
* Implement a cap on out-of-pocket expenses under traditional Medicare
* Negotiate lower drug prices for the program

We are proud of this work by our endorsed Members to guarantee the American Families Plan helps provide quality, accessible health care to tens of millions of Americans. **The push to expand Medicare has already been joined by at least 88 Democrats, including several more Members endorsed by Serve America.[ Will you take a minute to sign our petition showing your support?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/28306652/282828533/-322314742?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTYwM2I0Mi1hOWE3LWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJoL63LdJSlWItXxb1NJWdMdvqbAB7dPeF68ANhYseY=&emci=4d218f26-85a7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=4a603b42-a9a7-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=194769)** Medicare is one of the most successful federal programs in American history and it’s time to update, expand, and improve on it. name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Florida Stops the Rioters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Rioters are Scared |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0d1cf175bb&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c743abc88f&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by hard leftist Darren Soto. **

I almost won this district in 2020, beating the Dem incumbent - and because of my hard work and President Trump's leadership, this district has been moved to a toss-up.

Florida is showing the country how to govern. Thank God for Gov. DeSantis! He's convincing even the Dem areas to change their minds.

One thing you don't see in Florida: RIOTS.

As Antifa and BLM devastate city after city, and Democrat mayors and governors do nothing, Florida's cities remain riot-free.

Governor DeSantis just made sure it stays that way.

_Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis signed into law on Monday a sweeping bill that he says will increase punishment for people who violently riot, loot and destroy property, and punish cities that don’t protect lives and property and attempt to redirect funding for law enforcement.

Among many things, the “Combating Public Disorder” law:

-Allows the state to circumvent local authority and punish municipalities that attempt to reduce or eliminate funding for law enforcement

-Allow businesses damaged or destroyed in lootings or riots to sue municipalities that don’t provide law enforcement protection

-Increases legal charges for people who assault anyone, particularly law enforcement, or damage property during a riot

-Revises the prohibition on obstructing traffic by standing on the street

-Prohibits protesters from using or threatening to use imminent force against another person

-Requires a person arrested for rioting to be held in custody until their first appearance in court

-And prohibits defacing, injuring or damaging a memorial or historic property, including flags

“It is the strongest anti-rioting, pro-law enforcement piece of legislation in the country and there’s just nothing even close,” DeSantis said at a Monday morning press conference before signing the bill. “If you riot, if you loot, if you harm others, particularly if you harm a law enforcement officer, during one of these violent assemblies, you’re going to jail."_

This is what leadership looks like. You step up, you defend our people, you keep the peace and save the innocent. THAT is the role of government.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b859aa2718&e=afa21b7626)
---
| The crazy Democrats in Congress love rioters. If it was up to them, every small business would be attacked by woke, left-wing protesters. _This is crazy stuff, but they are hell-bent on weaponizing the Federal government against its own citizens._

**Until the Democrats prove they accept the Constitution and protect the lives and property of innocent people, they can never be trusted with the majority in Congress again.**

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. This seat is winnable, and I am the man to do it!

I am an America First patriot, I am a Christian, and I will vote with the Constitution. I will vote against riots, to protect the American people against Woke Tyranny!

If you value peace and freedom, I need your help. [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=888d95eed6&e=afa21b7626)

[Can I count on you for a donation to help me overcome the radical Left with America First patriots?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5205ad3893&e=afa21b7626)

The reality is clear - we need control of Congress. [Help me evict Pelosi - we can do this together!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=38974ba4ee&e=afa21b7626)

**_Let's get this done!_**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=4806fe7110&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=18fb053859&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=025ae525b0&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=4d5b15c42a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=4d5b15c42a).

clean_body: We know liberals will outspend us, but we can’t let them out raise us! Peter, Did you see this email from Josh? He’s absolutely right — liberals are trying to grab as much power as possible. He’s also right when he says we have a lofty end-of-month fundraising goal to hit! We know liberals will outspend us, but we can’t let them out raise us! Donate to Team Hawley, and help support Josh as he fights the good fight in D.C. Sincerely, Tyler Team Hawley \-------Forwarded message------- From: Josh Hawley Date: April 26, 2021 Subject: 5 Days | | Peter, We have 5 DAYS LEFT in April, which means we are locking in our end-of-month fundraising goal. We have to raise $50,000 before the end of this month and need your help. To the left, I’m public enemy number one, and the attacks against me have been unrelenting. The stakes have never been higher! The Liberals have been grabbing as much power as possible. They already control Big Tech, the media, Congress, and the White House. Now they are coming for the Supreme Court and pushing to add two new Liberal Senators through D.C. Statehood.I want my fundraising report to send them a message — I don't stand alone ; I stand with the thousands of patriots who have selflessly donated to my campaign, and furthered the conservative cause. Sincerely, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

subject: Launching a CRITICAL effort today

body:
Our Team Hern volunteers & I are working hard to get out the word.
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8b609ff65c8aae58/b27eb467be86b557c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter,

You’ve seen the headlines. You know what’s at stake. This week we’ll mark Joe Biden’s First 100 Days in office, and he’s been busy. During his first days in office, he issued a RECORD number of executive orders – igniting the Biden Border Crisis, killing energy jobs, and now coming after our Second Amendment rights. He’s also been working hand in hand with Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi to ram through the most extreme left-wing agenda our nation has ever seen... **And it’s clear that they want to secure PERMANENT Democrat majorities, by federalizing our elections (to impose their lax standards) and granting statehood to Washington, D.C. ** The latter is a clear attempt to _PACK THE U.S. SENATE_ with two additional Democrats! We need to defeat their radical agenda and defeat them at the ballot box. Your support is CRUCIAL, Peter. **[🚨 Please send an April end-of-month contribution to help keep our efforts on track!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8b609ff65c8aae58/0a26fafc81711a85c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** [**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8b609ff65c8aae58/38c83a2702da491cc3d6b838967d376c/34143) I’m proud to be leading the charge to protect jobs, secure our border, and rein in out-of-control spending in Washington. There is no question we have major challenges ahead of us under this Biden administration, and I’m grateful to have you on board. **We cannot afford to grow discouraged or give up. We MUST fight for America’s future.** That’s why my volunteer team and I have been hitting the phones recently, to get out the message about the Biden agenda directly to voters. We’re not going to let up. **[Pitch in $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 today, or more if you can](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8b609ff65c8aae58/b3964ac210320a31c3d6b838967d376c/34143)**. Thank you in advance for ANY donation you can help with as we close out April! Sincerely, Kevin Hern [**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8b609ff65c8aae58/4ef59b12121f9db7c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8b609ff65c8aae58/31ccbff622ad9d74c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/8b609ff65c8aae58/fd8c480e4bd48b3fc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

name: Erica Smith
subject: re: 1,000 donations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I’m a high school math teacher at heart, so let me do the math real quick.
#
Good news, y’all.
There are three days left in the month and we’re getting really close to reaching 1,000 individual donations during April.
This is an attainable goal we can absolutely reach by the end of the month!
I’m a high school math teacher at heart, so let me do the math real quick for you: Right now we’re at 866 individual donations for the month. That means we only need 134 more donations total by Friday (and at least 33 donations by the end of today) in order to stay on track.
So I’m putting this grassroots team up to the challenge:
[**_Will you help me reach 1,000 campaign donations by April 30 by making a donation of any amount today? Reaching this milestone by the end of the month will demonstrate to the Democratic establishment that we’re building an insurgent campaign to WIN this primary and deliver for North Carolina._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/284?refcode=em20210427-55&t=19&akid=55%2E3698%2ESdmKi9)
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/284?refcode=em20210427-55&t=20&akid=55%2E3698%2ESdmKi9)**
1,000 campaign donations might not seem like very many (if you’re running a typical establishment campaign, that is).
I’m talking about the moderate white Senate candidates that the Democratic party keeps supporting in Southern states like North Carolina, without letting voters have a chance to decide!
Establishment campaigns like these are by and for the well-connected. These campaigns have the DSCC’s rolodex of dyed-in-the-wool Democratic donors at their fingertips!
That’s why making a donation of any amount to our campaign today is so special. Not only would you be making one of the final 134 donations we need before April 30, you’ll help prove to the establishment that our moral movement is a force to be reckoned with.
[**Will you make a Founding Donation of any amount to help our campaign reach 1,000 individual campaign donations in the month of April? Your donation could be the one that puts us over the top.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/284?refcode=em20210427-other-55&t=21&akid=55%2E3698%2ESdmKi9)
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/284?refcode=em20210427-55&t=22&akid=55%2E3698%2ESdmKi9)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart. I’ll be back in touch later this week with more updates on our goal as we approach April 30.
In solidarity,
Erica
**[Donate »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/284?refcode=em20210427-55&t=23&akid=55%2E3698%2ESdmKi9)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210427-55-footer&t=24&refcode2=55_3698_SdmKi9&akid=55%2E3698%2ESdmKi9)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=25&akid=55%2E3698%2ESdmKi9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=55%2E3698%2ESdmKi9)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Biden's Price-Hiking and Job-Killing Climate Plan
body:
| | | | President Biden just announced his radical climate initiative which outlined his desire for America to reach net-zero emissions by 2050.
---
---
Dear Peter,

President Biden just announced his radical climate initiative which outlined his desire for America to reach net-zero emissions by 2050.

His plan requires the country to emit only 3.07 billion tons of carbon dioxide by 2030. In comparison, the country had emitted 5.25 billion tons in 2019.

We would fall short of his goal for 2030 even if we did all of the following:
* Shut down every coal power plant
* Cut natural gas production in half
* Retrofit 31.25 million homes that use natural gas with electric heat
* Replace 100 million passenger cars with electric cars

Implementing this unlawful climate plan will not only **eliminate so many good paying energy and manufacturing jobs** ; it would cause **electricity prices to skyrocket** , and leave Americans footing the bill.

Even worse? It will **harm our national security** and **provide China with huge
strategic advantages.** At the same time the U.S. will be forced to close all of our coal-fired power plants, China will be increasing coal usage by a dramatic amount.

China will not even consider emission reductions until 2030 while we unilaterally disarm.

I’m fighting against this unlawful overreach, but we need your help.

clean_body: | | | | President Biden just announced his radical climate initiative which outlined his desire for America to reach net-zero emissions by 2050. Dear Peter, President Biden just announced his radical climate initiative which outlined his desire for America to reach net-zero emissions by 2050. His plan requires the country to emit only 3.07 billion tons of carbon dioxide by 2030. In comparison, the country had emitted 5.25 billion tons in 2019. We would fall short of his goal for 2030 even if we did all of the following: Shut down every coal power plant Cut natural gas production in half Retrofit 31.25 million homes that use natural gas with electric heat Replace 100 million passenger cars with electric cars Implementing this unlawful climate plan will not only eliminate so many good paying energy and manufacturing jobs ; it would cause electricity prices to skyrocket , and leave Americans footing the bill. Even worse? It will harm our national security and provide China with huge strategic advantages. At the same time the U.S. will be forced to close all of our coal-fired power plants, China will be increasing coal usage by a dramatic amount. China will not even consider emission reductions until 2030 while we unilaterally disarm. I’m fighting against this unlawful overreach, but we need your help. Help us grow our team, gain strength, and Defend America today! Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey PS— Please and | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. subject: Every Bible-believing American will suffer under this legislation
body:
As our nation deals with the ripple effects of the COVID-19 pandemic, it is critical that Christian and conservative Americans hold the line on our va [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=671a277b0d9e40a29c3fad4497b63762&_e=ac-K64kuK-Gduk0QwTkvjC8Ho17VjbvNaI9LZ1llyi10U2xVDhCS86oUmzlXcqxfPLQIuEzAx_qV6L1A8Jafbz1mNYLRj50UWc9CwsRwvDHe8Q_6XketGHRBU2GLSkxQ5pyUuMHnqvvSOpl1VmJuXkLBXQrR06BatZYI_Zk9Lzf2pMmQAbHvOgB-MSB0LtAV1LA3WHxhezL747F7Y-tzRgIAkq17Ifoi-J7IptSg7RDR_-SSFwVwjG1GHK1WM3ynFSkoOg027HjFcNUIsHtb3fbJ1wolZPq6TTJQnUP5jyoFsZe7bV9qeIeDe7kzl_pW) | |
---
Dear fellow American,

As our nation deals with the ripple effects of the COVID-19 pandemic, it is critical that Christian and conservative Americans hold the line on our values as leftists try to exploit the crisis to push their anti-biblical policies.

Imagine an America where religious hospitals are forced to perform abortions. Where Bible-believing churches could be forced to hire pastors and other employees who don’t follow the teachings of the church and could be required to host same-sex wedding ceremonies. Where Christian schools are forced to cater to the preferences of students who identify as transgender, threatening the privacy and safety of young girls.

If the Senate passes the “Equality” Act — which has already passed the House of Representatives — _**this is the future that could lie before us**._

This disastrous legislation is an all-out assault on parental rights, on the family, and on millions of people of faith in our nation. It quarantines faith within your mind and says that’s where it must stay!

**Almost no institution or person of faith—be it a school, church, business, or non-profit—will escape the reach of this catastrophic bill if it passes the Senate and is sent to President Biden’s desk, where it’s sure to be signed into law. **

**[Can I count on your gift of $10, $25, $50, or more to help Family Research Council Action defeat the “Equality” Act today?](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=671a277b0d9e40a29c3fad4497b63762&_e=ac-K64kuK-Gduk0QwTkvjC8Ho17VjbvNaI9LZ1llyi10U2xVDhCS86oUmzlXcqxfPLQIuEzAx_qV6L1A8Jafbz1mNYLRj50UWc9CwsRwvDHxL0U8A4neRo7yHwu2focydzyU35UI4aKDflfiVyKE6AzUB7zDFhY1RXnShUDDPky96LveGYBtPHpbbMlfVUGYe1uJNjysLoVS56BR5h259jxNBuhkk3WbscfDXSjCCEzcyXDq7b_JoDls1Ue2clHE9TATOs_hqIIHEqPgJKtvrlnDXOlOoBbebIF0tnceN5h3gAl9N1een-liOSyu9n3o)**
[**Help Stop the "Equality" Act**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=671a277b0d9e40a29c3fad4497b63762&_e=ac-K64kuK-Gduk0QwTkvjC8Ho17VjbvNaI9LZ1llyi10U2xVDhCS86oUmzlXcqxfPLQIuEzAx_qV6L1A8Jafbz1mNYLRj50UWc9CwsRwvDE9GLiCqDs3ouCWudQQFBQXcbHFLZg75shJak3f58yH03hFUrG7kWDr1kFsFgJxL9UlBYAcDaV4YHqpvLOClr5nudR2FV9lJcM3uOxr0uVvMUucEy4AvA8fEqvo5tj8v_NnOPFUwQb-yRf_J0bbtvHVvjiFVUzYJWzk-5uAEZnLrAuHAoxcdp68CiUkK3af-rgw5AdOTme9Ho_QZhk0rl5z)
While touted as “equality,” this legislation would be more appropriately named the “Inequality Act.”

It aims to expand numerous civil rights laws, including the Civil Rights Act of 1964, to create protected classes based on sexual orientation and gender identity, thereby positioning the government to lord over churches and other faith-based institutions, potentially dictating who they hire, how their facilities are used, and even punishing some of them for not falling in step with a view of human sexuality that directly contradicts orthodox biblical teaching.

It would force all those in the medical community—regardless of their moral, religious, or medical opinions—to offer hormone treatment and transgender surgeries for individuals suffering from gender dysphoria.

**If passed and signed into law, it would cause a significant loss of religious freedom in America, and every Bible-believing citizen will suffer the consequences. **

**This bill is an egregious attack on the freedom to believe, and it must be stopped!**

Many of the nation's top evangelical pastors and religious leaders have already signed a letter warning against this bill, and now I need your signature to help stop this disastrous legislation.

**[I hope I can count on you to join us with your gift to STOP the “Equality” Act.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=671a277b0d9e40a29c3fad4497b63762&_e=ac-K64kuK-Gduk0QwTkvjC8Ho17VjbvNaI9LZ1llyi10U2xVDhCS86oUmzlXcqxfPLQIuEzAx_qV6L1A8Jafbz1mNYLRj50UWc9CwsRwvDFZG_heiWCILV5kPPDIU5E0PXN5bcWlWTxpC_RytyJJkqWyX7a0GTAl1GnAk0s5ToQs4yPAm4GhwdddGN6DUL7LSjHpQ0QxaRkKiUs4YAn0FaPzeeY9HrMqzF8xuj4C64OfezG7Lu_f0xOAfhmYBW2jlyaK6-dKwNnPtq6djqpmYQ4vh6qRr0CQZacZdRd3seYEVl2M3H8INsyLkQMejTdY)**

As the legislative affiliate of Family Research Council, FRC Action seeks to educate and influence elected officials on Capitol Hill and in the states, activate our grassroots network, and mobilize voters on behalf of faith, family, and freedom.

**FRC Action exists so that our nation’s most fundamental values are represented as we impact public policy, influence elections, and support candidates who share our values. **

Even during these difficult times, you and I must continue our vital work to defeat the “Equality” Act, which poses the gravest threat in decades to the American family and religious liberty.

But to continue leading the charge to stop this disastrous bill, we need your support.

**[Please help us urge the Senate to reject this legislation and defend religious freedom in America with your gift of $10, $25, or any amount today.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=671a277b0d9e40a29c3fad4497b63762&_e=ac-K64kuK-Gduk0QwTkvjC8Ho17VjbvNaI9LZ1llyi10U2xVDhCS86oUmzlXcqxfPLQIuEzAx_qV6L1A8Jafbz1mNYLRj50UWc9CwsRwvDGiPAhQSFtAe0gLkdA5K2WR-2QsgBYJOWyuDfD9rFJIH60MCpPRFi50wwkZr8oTgjJizGDxK3QYlnB_Glv937re_Im2AFP5U4S_R9lTOMjZ64J1s-hx1bKa3Jta3jnfFR7qcLRD5kAcZLC8jyJRsHkM4RIhNp-1F1be8FNVH-6fDyJOpNKTbYiSfe58AwbRP9FScqU4vc5H6m_Cd2-eQ8v1)**
[**Help Stop the "Equality" Act**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=671a277b0d9e40a29c3fad4497b63762&_e=ac-K64kuK-Gduk0QwTkvjC8Ho17VjbvNaI9LZ1llyi10U2xVDhCS86oUmzlXcqxfPLQIuEzAx_qV6L1A8Jafbz1mNYLRj50UWc9CwsRwvDHmkuK863-vE50h9xfdMNhbkdqqYOqRrMyh0km3w9S6lbf0wNJByEIGLPnQZj2CX_YBFV7CI7LXhN9XNguKZqCfrJ3rmV0hcpBAgndb2lEyymypg4QH8khCgWsUnbi4kWTKu1wAgIusmZc7jK4Ok0ZScjKmVvtwhkouiPd5yJbYK9UAmjq4gQOMl3SEPPMZf3tYbwPOTSww36dVO210SPCT)
With your help, we will defeat the “Equality” Act.

Thank you, and God bless!

For America,

Lt. Gen. (Ret.) William G. Boykin
Executive Vice President
Family Research Council Action
